title: Round Poly Satin Tablecloth
features: All South Street Tablecloths products are made to order and nonrefundable.
Poly Satin Tablecloths combine durability from polyester with all the elegance and shine that you've come to know from satin fabrics.
Available in an array of beautiful colors, our Poly Satin Tablecloth will provide an exceptional compliment to all your tableware and your entire event venue.
